headline: Discover the top S&P500 movers in Tuesday's after-hours session.
summary: Let's have a look at what is happening on the US markets after the closing bell on Tuesday. Below you can find the top S&P500 gainers and losers in today's after hours session.

headline: Home Construction Materials Stocks Q4 In Review: Masco (NYSE:MAS) Vs Peers
summary: The end of an earnings season can be a great time to discover new stocks and assess how companies are handling the current business environment. Let’s take a look at how Masco (NYSE:MAS) and the rest of the home construction materials stocks fared in Q4.

headline: Argan (AGX) Soars 12.6%: Is Further Upside Left in the Stock?
summary: Argan (AGX) witnessed a jump in share price last session on above-average trading volume. The latest trend in earnings estimate revisions for the stock doesn't suggest further strength down the road.
